calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-05-2007 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-05-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Will Chen, Clerk Carla Amador, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Joseph Stinson, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff John Stewart Company.
Francisco G. Torres representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Winston Gardner is present.
Melvin Belli representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located at 175 Sixth Street, #528, San Francisco, CA 94103.

This case settled, the trial date of September 10, 2007 is vacated.
